column1: #   - FAO Global Forest Resources Assessment 2020 [cite: fao_fra_2020]
#   - Fund for Peace Fragile States Index 2024 [cite: fund_for_peace_fsi_2024]
#   - I_colonial computed as (slave_population / free_population) at key census year.
#     Duration weighting: Haiti extraction period ~100yr (1697-1804); DR ~280yr (1496-1821)
#     but with low intensity; intensity-adjusted I_colonial reflects slaves/free at 1789 peak.
#   - GDP figures: colonial-era GDP are proxies for sugar/coffee export value (James 1938);
#     modern figures from World Bank WDI current USD.
#   - forest_cover_pct: 1923 from FAO historical reconstruction; 2020/2023 from FAO FRA 2020.
#   - electricity_access_pct and poverty_pct_365_day: World Bank WDI 2021.
